_comment: Controls which TCS structures trigger Telegram threshold-shift alerts and what delta (in points) must be exceeded before an alert fires. Remove a key from alert_structures to silence alerts for that structure. Set alert_structures to [] to silence ALL alerts, or delete this file to receive alerts for every structure (default). Use the optional thresholds map to set a per-structure minimum delta; structures not listed fall back to the global default of 5 points. Example: {"alert_structures": ["trend_bull", "normal"], "thresholds": {"trend_bull": 8, "normal": 3}}
